---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for Open Content Machine
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Who is it for?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature you'd like. If it involves a new data field, a new
dependency, or anything that would cross a trust boundary (e.g. sending
data to a model provider), call that out explicitly — see
[`docs/threat-model.md`](../../docs/threat-model.md) and
[`docs/architecture.md`](../../docs/architecture.md).

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative approaches you considered, and why you preferred this one.

## Additional context

Anything else that would help evaluate this request (mockups, related
issues, links to relevant roadmap items in [`ROADMAP.md`](../../ROADMAP.md)).
